scripts.bundle:openapi: redocly bundle ../../openapi/openApi.public.yaml -o openapi-bundle/public.bundle.yaml && redocly bundle ../../openapi/openApi.sso.yaml -o openapi-bundle/sso.bundle.yaml
scripts.generate:ws-types: modelina generate typescript ../../openapi/asyncApi.transactions.yaml -o src/generated/ws --tsModelType interface --tsExportType named --tsRawPropertyNames && node scripts/patch-ws-modelina-output.mjs
scripts.generate:api: pnpm run bundle:openapi && rtk-query-codegen-openapi openapi-codegen.public.cjs && rtk-query-codegen-openapi openapi-codegen.sso.cjs && pnpm run generate:ws-types
